framework.name: Danish Code of Practice for Information Security (DS 484 / DS/ISO 27001)
framework.scope: Danish code of practice and adoption guidance for information security management based on ISO 27001/27002 with Danish regulatory context
framework.structure_description: Controls organized by traditional ISO domains with Danish regulatory adaptations: organizational security, personnel, physical, access control, operations, procurement, and compliance.

controls.title: Management commitment to information security
controls.description: Management must demonstrate commitment to information security by approving the security policy and allocating resources.
controls.description_nl: Ledelsen skal demonstrere forpligtelse til informationssikkerhed ved at godkende sikkerhedspolitikken og allokere ressourcer.
controls.implementation_guidance: Dansk tilpasning: Ledelsesforpligtelsen skal dokumenteres med reference til relevante danske lovkrav (GDPR, NIS2).

controls.title: Information security organization
controls.description: The organization must establish an information security organization with clear roles and responsibilities at all levels.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal etablere en informationssikkerhedsorganisation med klare roller og ansvar pa alle niveauer.

controls.title: Information security policy
controls.description: An information security policy must be prepared that is approved by management and communicated to all employees.
controls.description_nl: Der skal udarbejdes en informationssikkerhedspolitik der er godkendt af ledelsen og kommunikeret til alle medarbejdere.

controls.title: Risk assessment and treatment
controls.description: The organization must conduct systematic risk assessment and treatment based on Danish and international standards.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal gennemfoere systematisk risikovurdering og -behandling baseret pa danske og internationale standarder.
controls.implementation_guidance: Dansk tilpasning: Inkluder vurdering af danske lovkrav (GDPR, sektorlovgivning) i risikovurderingen.

controls.title: Background check and security screening
controls.description: The hiring process must include relevant background checks proportional to the level of access to confidential data.
controls.description_nl: Ansaettelsesprocessen skal inkludere relevant baggrundscheck proportionalt med adgangsniveauet til fortrolige data.
controls.implementation_guidance: Dansk tilpasning: Foelg dansk lovgivning om baggrundscheck. Indhent straffe- og borneattest hvor relevant.

controls.title: Security awareness and education
controls.description: Employees must receive regular information security education tailored to their role and responsibilities.
controls.description_nl: Medarbejdere skal modtage regelmaessig uddannelse i informationssikkerhed tilpasset deres rolle og ansvar.

controls.title: Security at termination
controls.description: Upon termination, all access rights must be revoked and issued equipment returned within a defined deadline.
controls.description_nl: Ved fratraedelse skal alle adgangsrettigheder tilbagekaldes og udleveret udstyr returneres inden for en defineret frist.

controls.title: Physical access control to server rooms
controls.description: Server rooms and data centers must be protected with physical access control, logging, and monitoring.
controls.description_nl: Serverrum og datacentre skal beskyttes med fysisk adgangskontrol, logning og overvagning.

controls.title: Environmental protection of equipment
controls.description: Critical IT equipment must be protected against environmental threats such as fire, flooding, power failure, and temperature fluctuations.
controls.description_nl: Kritisk IT-udstyr skal beskyttes mod miljoetrusler som brand, oversvommelse, stroemsvigt og temperaturudsving.

controls.title: User access management
controls.description: There must be formal procedures for granting, modifying, and revoking user access to systems and data.
controls.description_nl: Der skal vaere formelle procedurer for tildeling, aendring og tilbagekaldelse af brugeradgang til systemer og data.

controls.title: Authentication and password policy
controls.description: The organization must have a password policy with requirements for length, complexity, and expiration, or use stronger authentication.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en adgangskodepolitik med krav til laengde, kompleksitet og udloeb eller anvende staerkere autentifikation.
controls.implementation_guidance: Dansk tilpasning: Foelg Datatilsynets anbefalinger for adgangskoder. Overvej MitID for borgertjenester.

controls.title: Backup and recovery
controls.description: The organization must have a backup strategy with regular testing of recovery procedures for all critical systems.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal have en backup-strategi med regelmaessig test af gendannelsesprocedurer for alle kritiske systemer.

controls.title: Logging and monitoring
controls.description: Security-relevant events must be logged and monitored with defined response procedures for anomalies.
controls.description_nl: Sikkerhedsrelevante haendelser skal logges og overvaages med definerede reaktionsprocedurer for anomalier.

controls.title: Network security
controls.description: The network must be protected with firewall, segmentation, and monitoring. Wireless networks must use encryption.
controls.description_nl: Netvaerket skal beskyttes med firewall, segmentering og overvagning. Traldose netvaerk skal anvende kryptering.

controls.title: Security requirements in procurement
controls.description: Security requirements must be specified when procuring IT systems and services and included in tender and contract materials.
controls.description_nl: Sikkerhedskrav skal specificeres ved anskaffelse af IT-systemer og -tjenester og indga i udbuds- og kontraktmateriale.
controls.implementation_guidance: Dansk tilpasning: Anvend SKIs rammeaftaler med integrerede sikkerhedskrav. Henvis til ISO 27001-certificering.

controls.title: Secure system development
controls.description: Systems must be developed with security integrated in the development process from requirements to deployment.
controls.description_nl: Systemer skal udvikles med sikkerhed integreret i udviklingsprocessen fra krav til idriftsaettelse.

controls.title: Compliance with Danish legislation
controls.description: The organization must identify and comply with all relevant Danish legal requirements for information security including GDPR and sector legislation.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal identificere og overholde alle relevante danske lovkrav for informationssikkerhed inklusiv GDPR og sektorlovgivning.
controls.implementation_guidance: Dansk tilpasning: Kortlaeg krav fra GDPR, NIS2, Sikkerhedscirkul aeret, sektorbekendtgoerelser og Datatilsynets vejledninger.

controls.title: Internal audit of information security
controls.description: The organization must conduct regular internal audit of the information security management.
controls.description_nl: Organisationen skal gennemfoere regelmaessig intern revision af informationssikkerhedsstyringen.
